channel.title: AllThingsSmitty/must-watch-css Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: AllThingsSmitty/must-watch-css Aug 17th - Aug 23rd, 2020

item.title: AllThingsSmitty/must-watch-css Aug 19th - Aug 25th, 2019
item.description:
2019

  • Using Devtools to Understand Modern CSS Layouts: Chen Hui Jing, CSSConf EU 32:39
  • Hello Subgrid!: Rachel Andrew, CSSConf EU 32:56

    • 2017

  • CSS and the First Meaningful Paint: Patrick Hamann, CSSConf EU 37:56
  • CSS [Variable] Secrets: Lea Verou, SmashingConf Barcelona 49:57

    • 2016

  • CSS Variables: var(--subtitle): Lea Verou, CSSConf US 56:57

    • 2015

  • PostCSS: The Future After Sass and LESS: Andrey Sitnik, CSSConf US 29:09
  • Your Very Own Component Library: Alex Sexton, JSConf AR 20:03
  • Let's Move: Benjamin De Cock, CSSConf AU 24:52
  • Inline Styles Are About to Kill CSS: Colin Megill, CSSConf US 36:11
  • Photoshop Is Dead!: Editing Images in CSS: Una Kravets, CSSConf EU 28:42
  • Enhancing Responsiveness With Flexbox: Zoe M. Gillenwater, CSSConf EU 37:13

    • 2014

  • 10 Commandments for Efficient CSS Architecture: Kushagra Gour, CSSConf Asia 35:55
  • CSS in Your Pocket - Mobile CSS Tips from the Trenches: Angelina Fabbro, CSSConf US 34:19
  • Styling and Animating Scalable Vector Graphics with CSS: Sara Soueidan, CSSConf EU 29:16
  • Build Scalable, Automated CSS: Christian Lilley, CSSConf Asia 48:47
  • CSS and the Critical Path: Patrick Hamann, CSSConf EU 33:42
  • CSS Performance Tooling: Addy Osmani, CSSConf EU 46:27

    • 2013

  • When Bootstrap Attacks: Pamela Fox, CSSConf US 28:48
  • CSS in the 4th Dimension: Lea Verou, JSConf Asia 44:49
  • Automated CSS Testing: Jakob Mattsson, JSConf Asia 42:07
  • CSSConf EU Keynote: Nicole Sullivan, CSSConf EU 20:57
  • Normalizing Designs for Better Quality CSS: Harry Roberts, CSSConf EU 43:40

item.title: AllThingsSmitty/must-watch-css Sep 1st - Sep 7th, 2014
item.description:
2012

  • Open Source Tools and Libraries for Designers: Julie Ann Horvath, HTML5DevConf 29:39
  • GitHub's CSS Performance: Jon Rohan, CSS Dev Conf 40:50

    • 2014

  • What Is a CSS Framework Anyway?: Harry Roberts, Industry Conf 48:48
  • CSS Is a Mess: Jonathan Snook, Beyond Tellerand 53:49
  • Slaying the Dragon: How to Refactor CSS for Maintainability: Alicia Liu, Front-Trends 33:21
  • Play Nice With CSS Tools and Methodologies: Brad Westfall, HTML5DevConf 42:47
  • Effortless Style: Heydon Pickering, CSS Day 49:51

    • 2013

  • Realigning & Refactoring UI: Jina Bolton, SassConf 48:08
  • Automating the Removal of Unused CSS: Addy Osmani, Velocity Europe Conference 5:57
  • The Humble Border-Radius: Lea Verou, Future of Web Design 37:07
  • Sass and OOCSS Sitting in a Tree K-I-S-S-I-N-G: Nicole Sullivan, TXJS 27:50
  • Architecting Scalable CSS: Harry Roberts, Beyond Tellerand 41:57
  • More CSS Secrets: Another 10 Things You May Not Know about CSS: Lea Verou, W3Conf 60:39

    • 2010

  • Handcrafted CSS: Dan Cederholm, Build Conference 44:29
  • The Top 5 Mistakes of Massive CSS: Nicole Sullivan, Build Conference 37:53
